response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with 15+ years of experience, including AI-agent infrastructure and cloud technologies. However, the role requires a Principal Engineer with deep AI strategy expertise and demonstrated leadership in AI-powered product development, which is not clearly evidenced in the resume.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience (15+ years)
Hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and cloud technologies (e.g., MCP, AWS CDK)
Entrepreneurial experience with open-source projects and startups
concerns: Lacks explicit AI strategy or leadership experience at the Principal/Director level
No advanced degree in AI or related field (only a BS in Computer Science)
Limited evidence of advising strategic customers or partners on AI adoption
